generic.source: Perform these actions at your own risk.

generic.source: Reset Cache may help in cases like if you are unable to modify the labeling configuration due to validation errors concerning existing labels, but you are confident that the labels don't exist.
generic.target: 如果您因为现有标签的校验错误而无法修改标注配置，但又确认这些标签实际上并不存在，重置缓存可能会有帮助。

generic.source: You can use this action to reset the cache and try again.
generic.target: 您可以使用此操作重置缓存后再试一次。

generic.source: Reset Cache may help in cases like if you are unable to modify the labeling configuration due to validation errors concerning existing labels, but you are confident that the labels don't exist. You can use this action to reset the cache and try again.
generic.target: 如果您因为现有标签的校验错误而无法修改标注配置，但又确认这些标签实际上并不存在，重置缓存可能会有帮助。您可以使用此操作重置缓存后再试一次。
